candidate_policy.interpretation: For every symbol node, add contains edges from up to four room nodes whose bbox strictly contains the symbol bbox and whose center also contains the symbol center.

required_before_runtime_promotion: Replay on a separate split or non-overlapping locked validation set.
Compare against existing fusion_v2 contains behavior with identical nodes.
Audit cases where the candidate adds multiple room contains edges per symbol.
Verify no increase in invalid graph rate or downstream warning count.
Confirm gains persist when symbol policy uses v28 default and P0-76 opt-in overlays.
failure_conditions: Candidate improves recall only by adding many extra contains edges.
Candidate creates multi-room containment conflicts that downstream consumers cannot support.
Candidate only works on oracle SVG smoke and fails on model/detector overlays.

implementation_guidance.preferred_next_step: Create an opt-in replay wrapper that applies this policy to fusion_v2 output and writes comparison metrics.
